title: T-032 — Reservation release service
prompt:
# T-032 — Reservation release service

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §9.4 (release triggers), V-WH-FEFO-006.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
`releaseReservation(reservationId, releaseReason, reasonText?)` Server Action setting released_at, restoring LP.reserved_qty/status, with audit on admin_override.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/reservation-release.ts`. release_reason ENUM ('consumed','cancelled','wo_cancelled','admin_override'). For 'admin_override' require RBAC Manager/Admin AND reason_text length ≥10 (V-WH-FEFO-006). Set released_at=NOW(), released_by=user. Update LP.reserved_qty -= reserved_qty; if all reservations released, LP.status reverts to 'available'. Insert audit row 'lp_reservation_released'.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/reservation-release.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/reservation-release.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given an active reservation, when releaseReservation runs with reason='consumed', then released_at is set and LP.reserved_qty decrements.
2. Given reason='admin_override' by an Operator, when called, then RBAC error returns.
3. Given reason='admin_override' by Manager without reason_text, when called, then V-WH-FEFO-006 error returns.
4. Given the last active reservation released, when committed, then LP.status reverts from 'reserved' to 'available'.

## Test strategy
- RED: reservation-release.test.ts covers four scenarios.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test reservation-release`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not delete reservation rows (audit-preserving).
- Do not skip admin_override RBAC + reason_text gate.
- Do not flip LP status while other active reservations remain.

pipeline_inputs.description: Reservation release with admin_override RBAC + reason_text gate; LP.status reverts when last reservation released.
pipeline_inputs.details: Audit log entry 'lp_reservation_released' mandatory. Single transaction.
acceptance_criteria: Given an active reservation, when released with reason='consumed', then released_at is set and LP.reserved_qty decrements
Given admin_override by Operator, when called, then RBAC error returns
Given admin_override by Manager without reason_text (≥10 chars), when called, then V-WH-FEFO-006 error returns
Given the last active reservation released, when committed, then LP.status reverts to 'available'
risk_red_lines: Do not flip LP status prematurely
